title: Robust Grassy Croatian Grape Nuts Skewers
description: A festive Croatian dish featuring grape nut cereal, yuzu-cure, and high-protein ingredients, perfect for a snack or light meal. This dish combines the crunch of grape nuts with the brightness of yuzu and the freshness of grassy notes.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, mix together crushed Grape Nuts cereal, yuzu juice, Greek yogurt, honey, and lemon zest.
Add the chopped fresh parsley to the bowl and stir to combine.
Thread the diced grilled chicken breast onto the bamboo skewers.
Brush the Grape Nuts mixture onto the chicken breast on the skewers.
Grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
